summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of VenueSearchPage filters completed. All backend API filters (vibe, guest count, venue types, sort, city) working correctly. All frontend filter interactions (chips, popovers, toggle, clear all) working correctly. Moods/Vibe filter confirmed working - Royal returns 27 venues from 82 total.

backend_sort_price_low.detail: GET /api/venues?sort_by=price_low returns venues sorted by price ascending

frontend_search_page_loads.detail: Search page at /venues/search loads with 82 venues across 9 cities

frontend_vibe_chips_visible.detail: 7 vibe chips visible (Royal, Modern, Garden, Poolside, Heritage, Intimate, Grand Ballroom)

frontend_royal_vibe_click.detail: Clicking Royal vibe chip highlights it, shows 'ROYAL VIBE' active chip, filters to 27 venues

frontend_vibe_toggle_off.detail: Clicking same vibe chip again deselects it, returns to 82 venues

frontend_sort_popover.detail: Sort popover opens with options: Recommended, Price Low to High, Price High to Low, Rating

frontend_sort_price_low.detail: Selecting Price Low to High shows cheapest venue first (ISKCON Dwarka ₹800/plate)

frontend_venue_type_popover.detail: Venue Type popover opens with checkbox options, multi-select works

frontend_venue_type_filter.detail: Selecting 5-Star Hotel filters to 27 venues, shows '1 TYPES' badge

frontend_clear_all.detail: CLEAR ALL button removes all active filters, returns to 82 venues

frontend_venue_card_click.detail: Clicking venue card navigates to detail page (/venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai)

frontend_landing_page.detail: Landing page (/) loads with splash screen, then shows search UI

frontend_customer_login.detail: Customer login (democustomer@venulock.in / password123) works, redirects to /my-enquiries

frontend_team_login.detail: Team login (admin@venulock.in / admin123) works, redirects to /team/dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: VenueSearchPage.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all filter chips
filterUtils.js: cleanFilters function correctly builds URL params from filter state
venues.py: Backend vibe filter uses 'vibes' field correctly with exact match
context_for_next_testing_agent: VenueSearchPage E2E testing complete. All filters working: vibe (Royal=27, Modern=25, Garden=9), guest count chips, venue type multi-select, sort options, city filter. Total 82 venues across 9 cities. Key data-testids: guest-chip-{min}-{max}, vibe-chip-{id}, mobile-sort-btn, mobile-venue-type-filter, mobile-more-filters. Moods/Vibe filter was reported as not working but is confirmed working correctly.
